Checking whether premises and conclusions cohere internally is warranted regardless of which reading of the delegation is correct.","R1.3":"Three concrete quantitative claims are advanced (35/40 ambiguity detection, 31/40 informative clarification, 47%→18% failure reduction) against a 40-command, single-environment evaluation. Whether the experimental setup is sufficient to support the generalizing conclusion ('substantial improvements'; 'step toward robot assistants') must be assessed.","R1.6":"'Take a look at this paragraph' most naturally triggers a prose-quality pass — sentence clarity, paragraph cohesion, and tonal register — making writing polish a plausible primary responsibility."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review focus primarily on writing quality and prose clarity (making R1.6 the load-bearing dimension), or on the technical and logical integrity of the claims — specifically the mismatch between the 'learning-based' framing and the frozen-LLM prompt-engineering implementation (making R1.2 and R1.3 load-bearing)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a salient internal contradiction: the system is branded 'learning-based' and the contributions claim a 'learned ambiguity-detection module' and a policy that 'improves with user feedback over deployment,' yet the described implementation is a prompt-engineering pipeline over a frozen, instruction-tuned LLM with no training loop or adaptation mechanism described. Checking whether premises and conclusions cohere internally is warranted regardless of which reading of the delegation is correct.
rationale.R1.3: Three concrete quantitative claims are advanced (35/40 ambiguity detection, 31/40 informative clarification, 47%→18% failure reduction) against a 40-command, single-environment evaluation. Whether the experimental setup is sufficient to support the generalizing conclusion ('substantial improvements'; 'step toward robot assistants') must be assessed.
rationale.R1.6: 'Take a look at this paragraph' most naturally triggers a prose-quality pass — sentence clarity, paragraph cohesion, and tonal register — making writing polish a plausible primary responsibility.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review focus primarily on writing quality and prose clarity (making R1.6 the load-bearing dimension), or on the technical and logical integrity of the claims — specifically the mismatch between the 'learning-based' framing and the frozen-LLM prompt-engineering implementation (making R1.2 and R1.3 load-bearing)?
